positioning: A Puerto Rican/ Egyptian/ anti - American performer (stage, film, voice, nightlife), theater producer, and educator. In my free time, you can find me connecting with my inner creature, painting portraits of my friends, or audio describing live performances for blind and visually impaired audiences. I believe art is one of the most powerful tools against oppressive systems, VAMOS!  Mylo can also be found A, or audio describing art for blind and visually impaired community members with Gravity Access Services.
